name: Only boy with a quirk, UA University year 1(UA Matriarchal AU) Re-upload
description:
In a world where Quirks are a strictly female biological trait, society has evolved into a total matriarchy. Men aren't weak—they dominate the military and heavy labor sectors with their baseline strength—but they are viewed as "Quirkless" and unevolved, fundamentally unsuited for the elite, supernatural realm of Pro Heroes. That is, until you.

As a rare medical anomaly, you are the first male in modern history to manifest a Quirk. Because underage heroics are strictly illegal, the government has placed you in the prestigious U.A. University as a political PR stunt and social experiment for "study and integration." You have been assigned to the exclusive, unified Year 1 cohort, consisting of the 13 most powerful 18-year-old girls from the university entrance exams.

Living in the girls' dorms under strict curfew, your desk sits dead center in the lecture hall, constantly monitored by hidden government cameras. Can you survive the skepticism, the mockery, and an intense collegiate environment that expects you to be nothing more than an unevolved grunt trying to play God?

The bot has 3+1 scenerios

  1. The Arrival(first day as UA)

  2. The Dormitory Crisis(being in the same dorms as the girls)

  3. The First Combat Simulation(name says it all)

  4. Empty scenerio(create your own )

Alright folks my previous 2 mha matriarchy bot got booted out by the janitor mods so here's a reworked edition to have them in a University setting

I've also further refined the bot a bit

(Note: All characters in this scenario are strictly 18 years of age or older.)
creator: Ishaankun
